about.title: About us
about.subtitle: A passion for the sea since 2010
about.heroText: Egadisailing was born from a passion for the sea and a love for the Egadi Islands. Since 2010, we have offered unique boat experiences for guests who want to discover one of the most beautiful stretches of sea in the Mediterranean.
about.storyText: It all started with a boat and a dream: to let every guest experience the magic of the Egadi Islands as we experience them every day. Today, with a carefully maintained fleet and a passionate crew, we continue to turn every outing into an unforgettable memory.
about.value1Desc: The sea is our home. Every day on board is an opportunity to share the beauty of the Egadi Islands with our guests.
about.value2Desc: A warm welcome, carefully prepared lunches and attention to detail: Sicilian tradition on board our boats.
about.value3Desc: We sail responsibly, protecting the marine ecosystem of the Egadi Islands for future generations.
about.crewText: Our team is made up of sea professionals: experienced skippers, talented chefs and attentive hostesses. Every crew member shares the same passion for the Egadi Islands and for hospitality.

islands.title: The Egadi Islands
islands.subtitle: Three jewels in the heart of the Mediterranean
islands.discoverExperiences: Discover experiences that visit this island

favignana.name: Favignana
favignana.description: The largest of the Egadi Islands, famous for Cala Rossa and its turquoise waters. Known as the 'Butterfly on the Sea' for its distinctive shape, Favignana offers stunning beaches, a charming town centre and the former Florio tuna factory, a testament to the island's historic tuna fishing tradition.
favignana.highlights: Cala Rossa, Cala Azzurra, Lido Burrone, former Florio tuna factory

levanzo.name: Levanzo
levanzo.description: The smallest and wildest, home to the Grotta del Genovese. With just 200 inhabitants, Levanzo is an unspoiled gem where time seems to have stood still. Its crystal-clear waters and rich marine life make it perfect for snorkelling.
levanzo.highlights: Grotta del Genovese, Cala Minnola, Cala Fredda, Faraglione

marettimo.name: Marettimo
marettimo.description: The most remote and unspoiled, a snorkelling paradise. Marettimo is the wildest island of the archipelago, with hiking trails through lush nature and sea caves accessible only from the water.
marettimo.highlights: Grotta del Cammello, Punta Troia, Cala Bianca, Scalo Maestro

experiences.title: Egadi Boat Tours from Trapani
experiences.subtitle: Choose your Egadi tour: chef on board, trimaran charter, private 4-hour tours and shared or private 8-hour boat tours. Prices and availability online.

boats.title: Boats for Egadi Tours from Trapani
boats.subtitle: Choose between the Neel 47 trimaran and the Cigala & Bertinetti 34 Offshore Open.

faq.title: Egadi Boat Tour FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking a boat tour in the Egadi Islands.
faq.a1: Preferably biodegradable sunscreen, swimwear, a personal towel, a sun hat and comfortable shoes. We also recommend bringing a light sweater for the return trip.
faq.a2: Yes. Up to 30 days before departure, you receive a full refund; from 29 to 15 days before departure, 50% is refunded; within 15 days of departure or in the event of a no-show, cancellations are non-refundable. Date changes are reviewed by the crew according to availability.
faq.q3: What happens in case of bad weather?
faq.a3: We constantly monitor weather conditions. In case of bad weather, we will contact you to reschedule the trip or provide a full refund. The safety of our guests is our top priority.
faq.a4: Yes, children are welcome on board! For very young children (under 3 years old), please contact us in advance. Children's life jackets are always available.
faq.a5: For Social Boating and the Exclusive Experience, the chef-prepared lunch is included in the price. For boat tours, lunch service can be added on request.
faq.a6: Boarding takes place at the Port of Trapani. We will send you exact directions and the meeting point by email after booking confirmation.
